priorities.label: Tighten voltkin-config.test.ts attackFireTick invariant `>=0` → `>0`. Council Q4 resolution: NO runtime guard added — control flow `ticksInState < FIRE_TICK` makes the FIRE_TICK=0 div-by-zero branch unreachable (ticksInState >= 0 always; < 0 always false). Test invariant tightening locks the wind-up>0 contract; runtime guard would be dead code. 1 LOC.
